chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1425 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 11.09.2017 Mr. Sumair S. Zaman, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahar, State Counsel a/w SIP Muhammad Mukeem Thari of P.S Jhudo Mirpurkhas and SIP Malik Riaz of P.S Chakiwara Liyari at Karachi. = It is stated by learned Counsel for the petitioners that petitioner No.1 Mst.Mehmooda being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 Majid Baloch out of her freewill and without any pressure vide Nikahnama dated 24.08.2017 at Page-19 (Annexure “A”) of the petition. On the same date, Mst.Mehmooda has also executed an Affidavit of Freewill at Page-17 (Annexure “B”), wherein she has stated that she wants to marry with Majid Baloch. She further states that nobody has kidnapped or abducted her. Both the petitioners present in Court state that after solemnizing marriage they are living their happy life. They further state that due to their marriage, the private respondents are not happy and they with the support of the official respondents are harassing them. Learned State Counsel has filed parawise comments of respondents No.6 and 7, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the petitioners’ Counsel. In the comments, the official respondents have categorically denied the allegations leveled by the petitioners in respect of causing harassment to the petitioners. It is also stated that the official respondents will provide necessary protection to the petitioners as and when the petitioners approach them.

In the comments, the official respondents have categorically denied the allegations leveled by the petitioners in respect of causing harassment to the petitioners. It is also stated that the official respondents will provide necessary protection to the petitioners as and when the petitioners approach them. Learned Counsel for the petitioners after the statement given by the official respondents is satisfied and seeks disposal of the instant petition. In view of the above, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the private respondents No.8, 9 and 10 namely Muhammad Hussain, Mehmood and Abdul Ghani that they should not cause any harassment to the petitioners and the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners in the event they approach them but strictly in accordance with law. Concerned SHO is also directed to serve the copy of this order on the above named private respondents by calling them in Police Station and compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE Shahid
